title: So Many Enchantments [Fabric]
description: Revised version of the original so many enchantments
body:
# So Many Enchantments
## Introduction
This revised mod adds many but not all advanced and supreme versions of the original Minecraft enchantments. 
As for what the advanced and supreme enchantments are, just go to this [spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1vB7MLEGOC564h-bJTeBC_g2LeUEMT8LVWQ6YOKfZhOo/edit?usp=sharing).
